mapper.sql: id, user_id, entity_type, entity_id, target_id, content, status, create_time, update_time, edit_count, deleted_by, deleted_reason, deleted_time
id, user_id, entity_type, entity_id, target_id, content, status, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into comment() values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY},#{userId, jdbcType=BINARY},#{entityType},#{entityId, jdbcType=BINARY},#{targetId, jdbcType=BINARY},#{content},#{status},#{createTime})
mapper.update: update comment set content = #{content}, update_time = #{updateTime}, edit_count = edit_count + 1 where id = #{id, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 0
